Notice Of Motion And Motion To Mediate Case In Lieu Of Non-Binding Arbitration
Off Calendar Feb-24-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendant Hubert Ortis' Motion to Mediate Case in Lieu of Non-Binding Arbitration is scheduled this day. There being no appearance nor an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Case is removed from Judicial Arbitration. Order signed. Case is ordered scheduled for Jury Trial on 8/29/2011 at 9:30 AM, in Department 206. Court to give Notice of the Trial Date and Mandatory Settlement Conference. Court Ordered a Mediation Enforcement Order to Show Cause on 5/25/2011 at 10:00 AM, in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-03-2010 Assigned To Arbitration On Feb-28-11; Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference On Apr-19-11 At 10:00 A.M.
